pluginMechanism: context routing and sandboxed tool output

args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
- Reads as: TypeScript module with extensive type interfaces for handler composition (1-10 handlers)
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating Hono apps with customizable initApp and defaultAppOptions. Provides createHandlers interface supporting 1-10 handlers.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: 144-line TypeScript file with route inspection utilities using WeakMap cache
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
- Safe summary: Provides route inspection functions for handlers. Returns matched routes, path, basePath. Uses WeakMap for caching computed basePath.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSContext, WSReadyState, WSEvents, defineWebSocketHelper, createWSMessageEvent, UpgradeWebSocket
- Read as: 140-line TypeScript module with WebSocket upgrade helper and context class
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for Hono. Provides WSContext class and defineWebSocketHelper function. Supports event listeners: onOpen, onMessage, onClose, onError.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: 146-line TypeScript module for cookie handling with signed cookie support
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading, writing, and deleting cookies. Supports signed cookies with secrets. Handles __Secure- and __Host- prefixes per RFC.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: 27-line TypeScript file for test client creation
- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../client/types, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types
- Safe summary: Creates test client for Hono apps using hc from client module. Wraps app with custom fetch for testing.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, Runtime type, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
- Reads as: 91-line TypeScript module for runtime detection (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light)
- Neighbor files: ../../context
- Safe summary: Detects runtime environment by userAgent or global properties. Provides env accessor typed by runtime. Supports Bun, Node, Deno, Cloudflare Workers, Fastly.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, DefaultContextType
- Reads as: 253-line TypeScript module for server-side CSS rendering with class name hashing
- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
- Safe summary: CSS helper for static site generation. Creates css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition functions with dynamic class names. Uses WeakMap to track used classes.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify, ClassNameSlug, OnInvalidSlug
- Reads as: 329-line TypeScript file with core CSS utility functions
- Neighbor files: ./index.ts
- Safe summary: Core CSS utility functions shared with css helper. Generates hashed class names, minifies CSS, validates slugs. Supports custom slug functions.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: 191-line TypeScript module for HTTP proxy functionality
- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: HTTP proxy fetch wrapper. Strips hop-by-hop headers, respects Connection header. Supports customFetch and strict RFC 9110 compliance mode.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: 80-line TypeScript module for dev tooling (route inspection and display)
- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
- Safe summary: Dev helper for showing registered routes. Prints method/path with handler names. Supports color output and verbose mode.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: 58-line TypeScript module for HTML string escaping and interpolation
- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper for template literals. Escapes values and returns HtmlEscapedString. Returns raw for unescaped content.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, toSSGInterface, ToSSGResult, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: Re-exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts (7 lines)
- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
- Safe summary: SSG helper index file. Re-exports toSSG function and related utilities from ssg.ts and middleware.ts. Provides static site generation.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGOptions, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult, createPool, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute
- Reads as: 471-line TypeScript module for static site generation
- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime, ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSG engine for generating static pages. Fetches routes, saves to filesystem. Supports concurrency, hooks, and dynamic route filtering.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir, normalizePath
- Reads as: 88-line TypeScript utility module for path operations and SSG filtering
- Neighbor files: ./ssg.ts
- Safe summary: SSG utility functions. Path manipulation (dirname, joinPaths), dynamic route detection, output directory safety checks.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSGParams
- Reads as: 84-line TypeScript middleware for SSG context management
- Neighbor files: ./ssg.ts, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSG middleware helpers. Marks SSG context, disables/limits routes to SSG only. Supports dynamic route parameters.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
- Reads as: 10-line TypeScript index file exporting streaming utilities
- Neighbor files: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
- Safe summary: Streaming helper index. Exports stream (generic), streamSSE (events), streamText helpers. Provides streaming responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, contextStash, TransformStream, StreamingApi
- Reads as: 46-line TypeScript streaming module with response streaming
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: Generic streaming response helper. Wraps TransformStream, handles errors, manages context stash for Bun compatibility.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage, run
- Reads as: 100-line TypeScript file for Server-Sent Events streaming
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
- Safe summary: SSE streaming helper. Extends SSEStreamingApi, writes event streams. Supports event, id, retry message fields. Handles errors with SSE error event.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: 16-line TypeScript file wrapping stream helper with text headers
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/stream, ./
- Safe summary: Text streaming helper. Sets Content-Type to text/plain, X-Content-Type-Options to nosniff. Wraps generic stream helper.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: 5-line TypeScript index file
- Neighbor files: ./accepts
- Safe summary: Accepts helper index. Re-exports accepts function from accepts.ts.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, acceptsConfig, Accept, defaultMatch, parseAccept
- Reads as: 50-line TypeScript file for accept header parsing
- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/accept, ../../utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header parser for content negotiation. Matches Accept-Language or Accept headers against supported types. Supports custom match function.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: 5-line TypeScript index file for connection info types
- Neighbor files: ./types
- Safe summary: ConnInfo helper index. Re-exports connection info types from types.ts.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, GetConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
- Reads as: 46-line TypeScript type definitions for connection info
- Neighbor files: ./index.ts
- Safe summary: Connection info type definitions. Defines ConnInfo interface with remote address/type, NetAddrInfo with transport/port details.

## Simple Index

- [ ] src/helper/route/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/websocket/index.ts

- [ ] src/helper/html/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- [ ] src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- [ ] src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- [ ] src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/streaming/stream.ts

- [ ] src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
